songs.title: Down
feed: “Down” by blink-182 reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Down” by blink-182 reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 22 spots to #1.
“Down” by blink-182 climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 22 spots to #1.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 165 sales units.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 275 streams units.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 450,702 total units.
